_doc: Botter species roster — DCSS-faithful subset. Each species applies a set of multipliers (hp_pct, atk_pct, def_pct, haste_pct) plus flat additions (crit_flat, regen_flat, aggro_flat, xp_pct, loot_pct) on top of the bot's base stats. Picked at character creation; locked per character. Save schema stores `species: <id>` on the bot dict. Read by Bot.recompute_stats via SpeciesData.

species.name: Human
species.lore: Versatile and unremarkable. The baseline against which all others are measured. Slight XP boost from adaptability.

species.name: Spriggan
species.lore: Forest-folk. Tiny and frail, but blindingly fast — both in step and in swing. The bot's original silhouette.

species.name: Minotaur
species.lore: Born to fight. Crushing strength, thick hide, slower swings than humans but each one bites deeper.

species.name: Naga
species.lore: Coiled serpent-folk. Heavy frame, slow on the move, but recovers wounds with quiet patience.

species.name: Tengu
species.lore: Crow-folk. Quick on the wing, sharp of eye. Aggressive and frail — strikes first, dies first.

species.name: Troll
species.lore: Ravenous regenerators. Knit flesh as fast as enemies tear it. Slow learners, but they outlast everything.

species.name: Octopode
species.lore: Tentacled scavengers. No armor restrictions, eight limbs to clutch trinkets. Fortune-favored finders.

species.name: Demonspawn
species.lore: Born of mortal flesh and infernal fire. Sharp claws, sharper instincts. Hated by the holy.

species.name: Vampire
species.lore: Undying drinker of the living. Drains life from every strike. Slow to bleed.

species.name: Mummy
species.lore: Bound in linen and ancient curses. Brittle, slow, but rich in the wisdom of the tomb.

species.name: Hill Orc
species.lore: Mountain raiders. Sturdy as stone, mean as winter. They take what they want and leave little behind.

species.name: Deep Elf
species.lore: Refined cave-dwellers. Frail, but their precision and learning make every strike count.

species.name: Gargoyle
species.lore: Carved of living stone. Ponderous, unflinching, nearly indestructible.

species.name: Halfling
species.lore: Small, lucky, and disarmingly cheerful. They find shiny things and stay out of harm's way.

species.name: Kobold
species.lore: Twitchy little hunters. Quick fingers, quicker feet, and a knack for spotting the gold first.
